candidateInventories.candidateLabel: LanceDB vector index / semantic retrieval runtime
candidateInventories.conditionText: An operator-stated product requirement explicitly needs CVF to add a live vector-backed semantic retrieval capability not satisfied by existing keyword/path-based lookup; or an external integration partner requires vector-similarity retrieval specifically, not existing memory routes.
evidenceFields: Source verification of the actual retrieval gap
A live/runtime proof plan naming the vector store, embedding model, and provider
requiredConditions: Source verification of the actual retrieval gap
A live/runtime proof plan naming the vector store, embedding model, and provider
candidateInventories.reproposalRule: Do not re-propose D-file06 runtime work to the operator without first checking whether the recorded reopen condition is met and citing that check; re-proposal requires source-backed evidence for each required condition above.

candidateInventories.candidateLabel: Learning Plane candidate promotion / advisory memory read
candidateInventories.conditionText: An operator-stated product requirement explicitly needs the Learning Plane to read memory-index candidates for reviewer-inspected promotion, and this is not satisfiable by the Learning Plane's existing consumer-pipeline contracts (EvaluationEngineConsumerPipelineContract, TruthScoreConsumerPipelineContract, pattern detection, feedback ledger); or a recorded, repeated defect shows the current Learning Plane contracts cannot express a real candidate-promotion need.
evidenceFields: Source verification against the current EXTENSIONS/CVF_LEARNING_PLANE_FOUNDATION/ contract surface
Explicit non-auto-promotion design (reviewer inspection remains mandatory)
Evidence that a memory-index read does not bypass existing evaluation/truth-score gates
requiredConditions: Source verification against the current EXTENSIONS/CVF_LEARNING_PLANE_FOUNDATION/ contract surface
Explicit non-auto-promotion design (reviewer inspection remains mandatory)
Evidence that a memory-index read does not bypass existing evaluation/truth-score gates
forbiddenUntilGatePasses: provider/live proof for Learning Plane memory read
candidateInventories.reproposalRule: Do not re-propose I-file19 runtime work to the operator without first checking whether the recorded reopen condition is met and citing that check; re-proposal requires source-backed evidence for each required condition above.

claimBoundary: This inventory systemizes the KIOD-R10 decision-packet reopen conditions for D-file06 and I-file19 into machine-checkable form. It does not reopen either candidate, does not authorize runtime implementation, provider/live proof, public-sync, package lifecycle mutation, Web/UI/dashboard work, MCP/CLI adapter behavior, model-router work, action authority, or automatic invocation. It preserves the exact reopen-condition semantics recorded in the KIOD-R10 decision packet and worker return; it does not loosen or reinterpret them.
